name: Black Salt & Black Sugar

sources.excerpt: Toast identifies 2826 Fallfax Dr, Falls Church and lists 15 current Black Salt Main Menu products.
Official homepage identifies Black Salt & Black Sugar, gives 2826 Fallfax Drive, Falls Church, VA, and links View Menu and Order Online.
Official menu navigation target inspected; no itemized allergen or ingredient document was exposed.
